title: boswellia undulatocrenata
intro: Boswellia undulatocrenata, also known as African frankincense, is a tree species in the Burseraceae family that is native to East Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidant compounds, which contribute to its ability to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Boswellia undulatocrenata include relief from arthritis, inflammatory bowel disease, and anxiety, as well as improved respiratory and circulatory health. Boswellia undulatocrenata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, capsules, and teas, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
